name: She Would Never Know
overview: Yoon Song Ah works as a marketer for a cosmetics brand. She enjoys her job and dreams of launching her own brand someday. Chae Hyun Seung is a fellow marketer who becomes attracted to Yoon Song Ah. He tries to develop a romantic relationship but Yoon Song Ah rebuffs his advances, not wishing to date younger men.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: She Would Never Know | 前辈，那支口红不要涂 | iQIYI
